engineering.description: Full access for software engineering. All tools available, extended timeouts.

design.description: Design & UX department. No DB or system access, extended output for assets.

soc-ops.description: Security operations. High throughput for scanning and monitoring.

marketing.description: Marketing department. Limited to content tools, no infrastructure access.

healthcare.description: Healthcare/compliance. Restricted data access, no web scraping.

astrology.description: Astrology domain. Ephemeris access, limited external tools.

hospitality.description: Hotel/hospitality management. Standard access with booking tools.
